channel.title: Cliff-De-Tech Engineering Logs
channel.description: Backend engineering insights, tutorials, and technical deep dives by Clifford Opoku-Sarkodie.

item.title: Securing FastAPI: JWT + OAuth Done Right
item.description: Deep dive into implementing production-grade authentication for Python APIs. Covers JWT best practices, token refresh strategies, and OAuth 2.0 integration patterns.

item.title: PostgreSQL Performance Tuning
item.description: How I improved query performance by 10x using proper indexing, query optimization, and connection pooling strategies for high-traffic applications.

item.title: Docker Multi-Stage Builds
item.description: Reduced image size by 80% using multi-stage builds. Learn how to create minimal, secure Docker images for production Python applications.

item.title: Event-Driven Architecture with RabbitMQ
item.description: Building scalable microservices using message queues. Explore patterns for async processing, dead letter queues, and retry strategies.
